user.title: Select printer
user.description: Select a Bambu Lab printer already set up via the ha-bambulab integration.

ams.title: AMS units
ams.description: Select the AMS units to monitor.

energy.title: Energy & costs
energy.description: Enter electricity price and filament cost so Bambu Companion can calculate print costs. The sensors are optional.

notify.title: Notifications
notify.description: Bambu Companion can notify you via your smartphone and/or the Home Assistant inbox. Both channels are independently configurable. Quiet hours suppress all smartphone notifications.

abort.no_bambu_devices: No Bambu Lab printers found. Please set up the ha-bambulab integration first.

init.title: Settings – Bambu Companion
init.description: Select the section you want to configure.

energy.title: Costs & Energy
energy.description: Enter your electricity price and filament costs. Optional sensors allow Bambu Companion to read live energy values from a smart plug or a dynamic tariff feed.

data_description.electricity_price: Price per kWh, e.g. 0.30 for 30 cents.
data_description.electricity_sensor: Sensor whose state contains the current electricity price in €/kWh.
data_description.energy_sensor: kWh sensor of a smart plug connected to the printer – enables accurate energy tracking.
data_description.filament_cost: Cost per kilogram of filament, e.g. 25.00.
data_description.currency: Currency symbol shown in sensors and cards, e.g. € or $.

notify.title: Notifications
notify.description: Phone channel and HA inbox are independently configurable. Quiet hours suppress all smartphone notifications.

data_description.printer_display_name: Name of the printer shown in notifications and cards.
data_description.notify_targets: Select your smartphone or tablet from the list of HA Companion App devices. Leave empty to use only the HA inbox.
data_description.notify_interval: A progress update is sent every X percent, e.g. 25 = at 25 %, 50 %, 75 % and 100 %.
data_description.quiet_from: Start of quiet hours – NO smartphone notifications after this time (applies to all event types). The HA inbox is not affected.
data_description.quiet_to: End of quiet hours – smartphone notifications resume.
data_description.notify_mobile_events: These events are sent as push notifications to the phone. Requires at least one selected mobile device.
data_description.notify_ha_events: These events appear in the HA inbox. No smartphone required.

maintenance.title: Maintenance intervals
maintenance.description: Intervals in hours or print count. A notification is sent when the interval is reached.

data.left_nozzle_replace: Toolhead left nozzle replaced – reset hours counter (H2D)
data.right_nozzle_replace: Toolhead right nozzle replaced – reset hours counter (H2D)
data.carbon_rods: Clean carbon rods – IPA only, no oil! (X1/X1C/X1E/P1S)

data_description.nozzle_clean: Trigger: nozzle print hours. Resets reminder only, not the hours counter.
data_description.nozzle_replace: Trigger: nozzle print hours. Resets the full nozzle hours counter to 0 when acknowledged.
data_description.left_nozzle_clean: Trigger: nozzle print hours. Resets reminder only.
data_description.left_nozzle_replace: Trigger: nozzle print hours. Resets left nozzle hours counter to 0 when acknowledged.
data_description.right_nozzle_clean: Trigger: nozzle print hours. Resets reminder only.
data_description.right_nozzle_replace: Trigger: nozzle print hours. Resets right nozzle hours counter to 0 when acknowledged.
data_description.filament_cutter: Trigger: print count | Wiki → Bambu: Filament Cutter
data_description.heatbreak: Trigger: print hours | Wiki → Bambu: Hotend Cleaning
data_description.lube_linear: Trigger: print hours | Wiki → Bambu: Linear Rods & Bearings
data_description.lube_z: Trigger: print hours | Wiki → Bambu: Lead Screws
data_description.carbon_rods: Trigger: print hours | Wiki → Bambu: Carbon Rods
data_description.belt: Trigger: print hours | Wiki → Bambu: Belt Tension
data_description.extruder_gear: Trigger: print hours | Wiki → Bambu: Extruder
data_description.fans_clean: Trigger: print hours | Wiki → Bambu: Part Cooling Fans
data_description.carbon_filter: Trigger: total hours | Wiki → Bambu: Carbon Filter
data_description.ams_gears: Trigger: print hours | Wiki → Bambu: AMS Maintenance

texts.title: Customise notification texts
texts.description: Customise titles, message bodies and button labels for each notification. Available placeholders: '{drucker}', '{name}', '{progress}', '{remaining}', '{duration}', '{weight}', '{energy}', '{cost}', '{wartung}', '{stunden}', '{intervall}'.

data_description.max_history: Maximum number of print jobs stored in the history. 0 = unlimited.
